description_long: This is a small, rustic cabin with a simple rectangular structure and a prominent gable roof made of corrugated metal. The exterior walls are a mix of weathered vertical wooden planks and rough, stucco-like plaster, giving it a utilitarian yet aged appearance. One side features a single, old-fashioned window with a distressed blue frame and four glass panes, suggesting limited natural light inside. The front of the cabin has a wide, open doorway with a wooden ramp leading up to it, but no visible door is present. The roof overhangs the walls, providing some shelter to the entrance and window. The overall design is functional and modest, suitable for use as a small urban outbuilding or a simple residential shelter.
description: A small, rustic cabin with a gable metal roof, weathered wood and plaster walls, a single window, and an open front entrance with a wooden ramp.
description_view_0: This view shows the cabin's plaster wall with a single blue-framed window and part of the wooden side wall beneath the overhanging gable roof.
description_view_1: This view highlights the plaster wall with the window centered beneath the metal roof, showing the cabin's simple, unadorned facade.
description_view_2: This view displays the plain plaster wall and the adjoining weathered wooden wall, with the roof's overhang clearly visible.
description_view_3: This view reveals the open front entrance with a wooden ramp and the full width of the vertical wooden plank wall under the roof.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with corrugated metal panels and moderate overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: one medium-sized, rectangular window with a blue frame, centered on the plaster wall; no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: one large open entrance centered on the wooden plank wall at the front, no visible door
